mapper.select:
select t1.* from sys_user t1 inner join sys_user_role t2 on t1.id = t2.user_id inner join sys_role t3 on t2.role_id = t3.id where t1.super_admin = 0 and t1.db_status = 1 and t2.db_status = 1 and t3.db_status = 1 and t3.id = #{params.roleId}
and (t1.real_name like concat("%",#{params.keyWord},"%") or t1.username like concat("%",#{params.keyWord},"%") or t1.mobile like concat("%",#{params.keyWord},"%") or t1.email like concat("%",#{params.keyWord},"%") or t1.note like concat("%",#{params.keyWord},"%"))
